notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Ezequiel Duran out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Ezequiel Duran out at 1st.
